question: 北京市2017年至2024年的平均月薪年度趋势
ground_truth_sql:
SELECT year, AVG(avg_monthly_wage_cny) AS avg_wage
FROM employment_stats
WHERE geo_name = '北京' AND year BETWEEN 2017 AND 2024
GROUP BY year
ORDER BY year

question: 2024年各季度的1年期LPR和10年期国债收益率平均值
ground_truth_sql:
SELECT CASE WHEN month BETWEEN 1 AND 3 THEN 1 WHEN month BETWEEN 4 AND 6 THEN 2 WHEN month BETWEEN 7 AND 9 THEN 3 ELSE 4 END AS quarter, AVG(lpr_1y_pct) AS avg_lpr_1y, AVG(bond_10y_pct) AS avg_bond_10y
FROM interest_rates
WHERE year = 2024
GROUP BY quarter
ORDER BY quarter

question: 2024年和2025年各年各季度的沪深300指数平均收盘价是多少？

question: 查询2018-2024年全国服务类CPI同比涨幅的年均值趋势
ground_truth_sql:
SELECT c.year, AVG((c.services_cpi_idx - p.services_cpi_idx) * 100.0 / p.services_cpi_idx) AS avg_yoy
FROM cpi_inflation c
JOIN cpi_inflation p
ON c.geo_level = p.geo_level AND c.month = p.month AND c.year = p.year + 1
WHERE c.geo_level = 'national' AND c.year BETWEEN 2018 AND 2024
GROUP BY c.year
ORDER BY c.year

{"sql1": "SELECT youth_unemp_rate_pct AS youth_2023_12
FROM employment_stats
WHERE year = 2023 AND month = 12 AND geo_level = 'national'", "sql2": "SELECT youth_unemp_rate_pct AS youth_2018_12
FROM employment_stats
WHERE year = 2018 AND month = 12 AND geo_level = 'national'"}

question: 2023年哪些省份的M2货币同比增速年均值超过8.3%？
ground_truth_sql:
SELECT geo_name
FROM money_supply
WHERE year = 2023 AND geo_level = 'province'
GROUP BY geo_name
HAVING AVG(m2_yoy_pct) > 8.3
ORDER BY geo_name

question: 各地区中电价最低的记录是哪个地区哪个月？
ground_truth_sql:
SELECT geo_name, year, month
FROM energy_prices
WHERE geo_level = 'region'
ORDER BY electricity_price_cny_per_kwh ASC
LIMIT 1

question: 计算2022年全国食品CPI指数的年度平均值
ground_truth_sql:
SELECT AVG(food_cpi_idx) AS value
FROM cpi_inflation
WHERE year = 2022 AND geo_level = 'national'

question: 2024年哪个省份的M2货币供应余额最高？
ground_truth_sql:
SELECT geo_name
FROM money_supply
WHERE year = 2024 AND geo_level = 'province'
ORDER BY m2_100m_cny DESC
LIMIT 1

question: 按区域层级统计2023年的平均消费支出
ground_truth_sql:
SELECT geo_name, AVG(consumption_100m_cny) AS avg_consumption
FROM gdp_expenditure
WHERE year = 2023 AND geo_level = 'region'
GROUP BY geo_name
ORDER BY avg_consumption DESC

question: 2023年第4季度全国企业信用债新发行量最大的行业是哪个？
ground_truth_sql:
SELECT sector 
FROM corporate_credit 
WHERE year = 2023 AND quarter = 4 AND geo_level = 'national' 
ORDER BY new_issuance_100m_cny DESC 
LIMIT 1

question: 东北地区历史上电价的平均水平是多少？
ground_truth_sql:
SELECT AVG(electricity_price_cny_per_kwh) AS value
FROM energy_prices
WHERE geo_name = '东北'

question: 2017年至2024年每年全国的平均失业率
ground_truth_sql:
SELECT year, AVG(unemployment_rate_pct) AS avg_rate
FROM employment_stats
WHERE geo_level = 'national' AND year BETWEEN 2017 AND 2024
GROUP BY year
ORDER BY year

question: 2024年华东地区的人民币贷款余额年均值比华北地区高出多少亿元？
ground_truth_sql:
{"sql1": "SELECT AVG(loan_balance_100m_cny) AS hd_loan
FROM money_supply
WHERE year = 2024 AND geo_level = 'region' AND geo_name = '华东'", "sql2": "SELECT AVG(loan_balance_100m_cny) AS hb_loan
FROM money_supply
WHERE year = 2024 AND geo_level = 'region' AND geo_name = '华北'"}

question: 2022年外汇储备的最低值和最高值分别是多少？
ground_truth_sql:
SELECT MIN(fx_reserve_100m_usd) AS min_reserve, MAX(fx_reserve_100m_usd) AS max_reserve
FROM exchange_rates
WHERE year = 2022

question: 2024年哪些月份的A股市场月度成交额超过30万亿元？
ground_truth_sql:
SELECT year, month
FROM stock_indices
WHERE year = 2024 AND market_turnover_100m_cny > 300000
ORDER BY year, month

question: 2024年所有省份的地区GDP总量加总是多少亿元？
ground_truth_sql:
SELECT SUM(gdp_100m_cny) AS value
FROM regional_gdp
WHERE year = 2024 AND geo_level = 'province'

question: 全国金融行业企业债券违约率从2016年到2024年的年度变化趋势如何？
ground_truth_sql:
SELECT year, AVG(default_rate_pct) AS avg_default_rate
FROM corporate_credit
WHERE geo_level = 'national' AND sector = '金融' AND year BETWEEN 2016 AND 2024
GROUP BY year
ORDER BY year

question: 2023年碳价最高的前5个区域月度记录有哪些？
ground_truth_sql:
SELECT geo_name, year, month
FROM energy_prices
WHERE year = 2023 AND geo_level = 'region'
ORDER BY carbon_price_cny_per_tco2 DESC
LIMIT 5
